recommendations.title: 3-Headed Shark Attack
recommendations.overview: The world’s greatest killing machine is three times as deadly, when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship. As the shark eats its way from one end of the ship to the next, the passengers fight the deadly predator using anything they can find.

recommendations.title: 2-Headed Shark Attack
recommendations.overview: A Semester at Sea ship is attacked and sunk by a mutated two-headed shark, and the survivors seek refuge on a deserted atoll. The coeds, however, are no longer safe when the atoll starts flooding.

recommendations.title: Mercenaries
recommendations.overview: A diplomatic official is captured and imprisoned while touring a war zone, so a team of elite female commandos is assembled to infiltrate a women's prison for a daring rescue.

recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Mecha Shark
recommendations.overview: When another Mega Shark returns from the depths of the sea, world militaries go on high alert. Ocean traffic grinds to a standstill as everyone lives in fear of the insatiable beast. Out of options, the US government unleashes the top secret Mecha Sh

recommendations.title: Toxic Shark
recommendations.overview: A tropical singles retreat takes a terrifying turn when guests realize a poisonous shark is infesting the surrounding water. Not only will it rip apart its victims, but it also uses projectile acid to hunt - in and out of the water.

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.

recommendations.title: Paprika
recommendations.overview: When a machine that allows therapists to enter their patient's dreams is stolen, all hell breaks loose. Only a young female therapist can stop it and recover it before damage is done: Paprika.

recommendations.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
recommendations.overview: An Edinburgh professor and assorted colleagues follow an explorer's trail down an extinct Icelandic volcano to the earth's center.

recommendations.title: Flashback
recommendations.overview: A female lawyer travels back in time and crosses paths with other women in history who fought for women's rights.

recommendations.title: Megalodon Rising
recommendations.overview: When history’s greatest aquatic predator returns, the armada of modern warships sent to destroy it has no chance at all.
